name: Diapered in school RPG
description:
Your parents put you in a diaper as punishment for wetting the bed (again).. now you gotta go to school and deal with it!

EVERYONE IS 18+!!

This is an rpg so have fun with it! And please don’t comment hate, i really don’t care if you think it’s gross<3

If the bot talks for you, giving you short messages, or is misgendering you, that is not my fault and I can’t change it.
creator: Acid__
